simple_types.name: Base_Address_Lenght
simple_types.code: type Base_Address_Lenght is new Integer range 1 .. 4;

simple_types.name: Radio_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Radio_Mode is (Nordic_1MBIT,
                    Nordic_2MBIT,
                    Nordic_250KBIT,
                    BLE_1MBIT);

simple_types.name: Radio_Power
simple_types.code:
type Radio_Power is (Zero_Dbm,
                     Pos_4_Dbm,
                     Neg_30_Dbm,
                     Neg_20_Dbm,
                     Neg_16_Dbm,
                     Neg_12_Dbm,
                     Neg_8_Dbm,
                     Neg_4_Dbm);

simple_types.name: Radio_State
simple_types.code:
type Radio_State is (Disabled,
                     Rx_Ramp_Up,
                     Rx_Idle,
                     Rx_State,
                     Rx_Disabled,
                     Tx_Ramp_Up,
                     Tx_Idle,
                     Tx_State,
                     Tx_Disabled);

simple_types.name: Shortcut
simple_types.code:
type Shortcut is (Ready_To_Start,
                  End_To_Disable,
                  Disabled_To_TXen,
                  Disabled_To_RXen,
                  Address_To_RSSIstart,
                  End_To_Start,
                  Address_To_BCstart);

documentation.description:
Setup shortcuts for the radio device. Shortcuts will start a task when
the associated event is triggered.

array_types.name: Logic_Address_Mask
array_types.code: type Logic_Address_Mask is array (Radio_Logic_Address) of Boolean with Pack;

subprograms.name: Configure_CRC
Configure_Packet

documentation.description: Return True if the last packet was recieved with a CRC error

Return the logic address on which previous packet was received.
(see Set_TX_Address() for definition of logic adresses)

subprograms.name: Set_Logic_Addresses

documentation.description: Set packet address for RX or TX
Mask logical adresses that will be used for RX

Select on of the logic address composed with Base[0-1] and AP[0-7]
Logic Address | Base  | Prefix Address
0             | Base0 | AP0
1             | Base1 | AP1
2             | Base1 | AP2
3             | Base1 | AP3
4             | Base1 | AP4
5             | Base1 | AP5
6             | Base1 | AP6
7             | Base1 | AP7

Configure the radio for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) operations
This procedure doesn't set:
  - Power
  - Frequency
  - Shortcuts
  - Adresses
Return the current state of the radio

subprograms.name: Translate_Logic_Address

documentation.description: Return the base a prefix coresponding the given logic address
